name: Potato-Chive Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the potatoes, sour cream, parsley, garlic, eggs, chives, bacon fat, dry mustard, and thyme in a large bowl. Mix well and season to taste with salt, pepper, and cayenne.
2. Form the mixture into 1-inch diameter balls.
3. Dredge each ball in flour.
4. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
5. Add the fritters in small batches and fry for 1 minute, until golden brown. Drain well on a cooling rack and blot with paper towels.
6. Transfer the fritters to a warm oven-safe pan. Repeat with the remaining balls.
7. Serve hot.
